title: v2.1.144
reason: New Claude Code CLI version with concrete workflow improvements for developers managing sessions and model defaults.
post_text: Claude Code CLI v2.1.144 adds /resume for background sessions & allows setting default models for new sessions. Builders can now manage long-running AI tasks more efficiently and customize their default model per project.
source_angle: Claude Code CLI update improves developer workflow

title: v0.103.1
reason: New SDK version with a specific bug fix for tool calls. Directly actionable for developers using Anthropic's Python SDK.
post_text: Anthropic Python SDK v0.103.1 fixes a bug in `SessionToolRunner` that skipped unowned tool calls. Builders using tool-calling agents should update to prevent unexpected behavior and improve reliability.
source_angle: Anthropic Python SDK bug fix for tool calls

title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official — Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
reason: Official directory of Claude plugins provides immediate, vetted resources for developers.
post_text: Anthropic launched an official GitHub directory for Claude Code Plugins. Builders can now find vetted, high-quality integrations to extend Claude's capabilities in their applications.
source_angle: Anthropic's official GitHub for Claude plugins

title: microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners — 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
reason: Microsoft released an open-source curriculum with code for building AI agents, available now for developers to use.
post_text: Microsoft released 'AI Agents for Beginners,' a 12-lesson open-source curriculum on GitHub. Builders can use this resource to learn and implement practical AI agent patterns with provided code examples.
source_angle: Microsoft's open-source AI agent curriculum for developers

title: tinyhumansai/openhuman — Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
post_text: tinyhumansai/openhuman — Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful. The signal to watch: whether this changes measurable capability, reliability, or cost in real AI workloads.

title: rohitg00/agentmemory — #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
post_text: rohitg00/agentmemory — #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks. Agent reliability in production is still the hard part — check whether the evals reflect real task completion, not just capability demos.
